raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "affirming and prescribing an embodied, rhythmic harmony with natural appetite as a spiritual norm",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "hunger at regular intervals is an inherently agreeable and positive signal",
    "eating in response to this signal produces uncomplicated enjoyment",
    "moderation (non-overeating) is the spontaneous outcome of such attuned eating",
    "this three-meal pattern constitutes a desirable metaphysical or spiritual alignment"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally consistent within a frame that equates bodily attunement with spiritual health, though it assumes uniform physiology and ignores contextual variation",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "recipient experiences disconnection from bodily cues or seeks to reframe eating as mindful gratitude rather than compulsion or restriction",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "recipient has medical, psychological, or metabolic conditions that make scheduled hunger signals unreliable or harmful"
}
